Headline: #54 Cicero Temporary Reroute at Cicero/Lake
ShortDescription: #54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted via Cicero, Madison, Laramie, Chicago, then resume their normal route on Cicero due to police activity nr Cicero/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cicero, Madison, Laramie, Chicago, then resume their normal route on Cicero.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near Cicero/Lake.
